title: SiIvaGunner Music Disc Mod
description: A Minecraft mod that adds a variety of SiIvaGunner-themed Music Discs to your game.
body:
This is a Minecraft mod developed for Minecraft 1.21 and 1.20, focused on adding a variety of Music Discs themed around the YouTube channel, SiIvaGunner.

As of right now, the mod contains 133 unique Music Discs, with each disc containing a track themed around a certain character/meme found on the channel. Each Music Disc can be obtained in Survival Mode, whether it be through crafting, loot chests, or other various means.

All music comes from the SiIvaGunner channel and their respective authors.
